title: verbascum rupestre
intro: Verbascum rupestre, also known as the Rocky Mountain mullein or mountain mullein, is a perennial plant species belonging to the figwort family, characterized by its tall stems and yellow flowers. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, which can help soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Verbascum rupestre include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and support skin health, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or topical application, and its leaves and flowers can be dried and used in herbal preparations, such as tinctures and salves.
